Package index

All functions

Piezo1TxSpots() Piezo1TissueBoundary() Piezo1Binned() Piezo1BinAnalyses()
Download Xenium data from Xue et al.
clusterLeeCurves()
Cluster Lee's L curves
clusterMoranCurves()
Cluster Moran's I curves
getBinOverlapProp()
Find portion of each bin overlapping the tissue or cells
getCellChatDB()
Download CellChat database
getCellChatInfo()
Filter Lee's L results for gene pairs in CellChatDB
getMoranMeanVar()
Get the mean and variance of Moran's I
makeAggregates()
Aggregate transcript spots into bins of varying sizes
plotClusterMedians()
Plot cluster median curves
plotEigenvalues()
Plot variance explained across bin sizes
plotLeeCurves()
Plot Lee's L curves
plotLeeSelect()
Plot select Lee's L curves
plotLoadingCurves()
Plot gene loadings of a given principal component across scales
plotMoranCurves()
Plot Moran's I curves
plotMoranPCs()
Plot Moran's I of bin projection in PCA space
plotSFEs()
Plot gene expression from multiple SFE objects
plotSFEsBiscale()
Plot pairs of genes in space from multiple SFE objects
plotSFEsRedDim()
Plot dimension reduction in space for multiple SFE objects
readBinSamples()
Read one bin size from multiple samples
readBins()
Read aggregated data from multiple bin sizes for the same sample
readLeeSamples()
Read multi-sample Lee's L results from multiple samples
readMoranSamples()
Read multi-scale Moran's I results from multiple samples
removeEdgeBins()
Remove bins that overlap too little with the tissue boundary
runBinAnalyses()
Run basic analyses on aggregated SFE objects of all bin sizes
runBinLMM()
Use linear mixed model to compare among groups
sample_info
Sample info for the Piezo1 Xenium data
toMultifileParquet()
Convert transcript spot files to multi-file Parquet

Developed by Lambda Moses.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
